languages.text: "Я отыскал его в черной гробнице, принадлежавшей сородичам подлого ксеноса Тразина. Его прежний обладатель не разжимал иссохших рук, даже в смерти не желая расставаться со своим оружием. Это рвение, а также мастерство, с которым сделан клинок, разожгли во мне любопытство. Я путешествовал в самые дальние уголки Простора Коронус, чтобы узнать правду об этом артефакте. И, наконец, мне удалось схватить одного из так называемых Детей Азуриана. Под пытками ксенос назвал меч "Багряной пляской Кхейна" и поведал историю: могучий воитель эльдаров, владевший реликвией прежде, отправился уничтожить логово древнего врага, называемого ими "огир". И, очевидно, не преуспел".

traits.locale_text: "Я отыскал его в черной гробнице, принадлежавшей сородичам подлого ксеноса Тразина. Его прежний обладатель не разжимал иссохших рук, даже в смерти не желая расставаться со своим оружием. Это рвение, а также мастерство, с которым сделан клинок, разожгли во мне любопытство. Под пытками ксенос назвал меч "Багряной пляской Кхейна" и поведал историю: могучий воитель эльдари, владевший реликвией прежде, отправился уничтожить логово древнего врага, называемого ими "огир". И, очевидно, не преуспел".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. Eventually, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."
languages.original_text: "Я отыскал его в черной гробнице, принадлежавшей сородичам подлого ксеноса Тразина. И, очевидно, не преуспел".

traits.locale_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness as well as the blade's masterful craftsmanship sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. Finally, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

"I found it within a black tomb belonging to the kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. It may have been a trophy of an ancient war. The blade was undoubtedly the work of Aeldari masters. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth of this artefact. Finally, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Sword of Bloody-Handed Fury' and recounted this history: in an ancient war between the 'old Empire' and certain 'Oghyr', the enemy felled a legendary Aeldari warrior and claimed the blade as a trophy."

"I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

"I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. It may have been a trophy of some ancient war. The blade was undoubtedly the work of Aeldari masters. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. In an ancient war between 'the old Empire' and a certain 'Oghyr,' the enemy felled a legendary Aeldari warrior and claimed the blade as a trophy."

A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

languages.text: "Ich fand es in einer schwarzen Gruft der Sippe des niederträchtigen Xenos Trazyn. Der ehemalige Besitzer, ein Aeldari, hielt es fest in seinen verdorrten Händen, als wolle er sich selbst im Tod nicht davon trennen. Diese Beharrlichkeit und die meisterhafte Verarbeitung der Klinge weckte mein Interesse. Ich reiste zu den fernsten Ausläufern der Koronus-Ausdehnung, um die Wahrheit über dieses Artefakt zu ergründen. Schließlich konnte ich eines dieser sogenannten Kinder von Asuryan gefangen nehmen. Unter Folter identifizierte der Xenos die Klinge als 'Blutroter Tanz von Khaine' und erzählte mir ihre Geschichte. Das Relikt gehört einst einem mächtigen Aeldari-Krieger. Dieser Krieger zog aus, um einen Hort der Oghyr zu zerstören, wie sie die Erzfeinde ihrer Art nannten. Offenbar ohne Erfolg."
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

languages.text: « Je l'ai trouvée dans un tombeau obscur appartenant à la famille de l'ignoble xénos Trazyn. Son ancien propriétaire, un Aeldari, la tenait fermement dans ses mains décharnées, comme s'il refusait de s'en séparer, même dans la mort. Cette obstination et la qualité extraordinaire de la lame ont piqué ma curiosité. J'ai voyagé jusqu'aux confins des Étendues de Koronus pour tenter d'en apprendre plus à son sujet et j'ai fini par capturer l'un de ces prétendus "Enfants d'Asuryan". Sous la torture, le xénos m'a avoué que cet artefact était surnommé la "Danse écarlate de Khaine" et m'a raconté son histoire. Cette lame fut la propriété d'un puissant guerrier aeldari. Celui-ci avait décidé d'assaillir l'un des repaires de l'ancien ennemi de son espèce, qu'on surnommait l'Oghyr. De toute évidence, il a échoué. »
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. Eventually, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

Celui-ci avait décidé d'assaillir l'un des repaires de l'ancien ennemi de son espèce, qu'on surnommait l'Oghyr. De toute évidence, il a échoué. »

languages.text: «La encontré en una negra tumba perteneciente a los congéneres del vil xenos Trazyn. Su anterior propietario, un Aeldari, la sujetaba fuertemente entre sus manos marchitas, como si se negara a soltarla ni muerto. Esa testarudez, unida a la artesanía de la espada, despertó mi interés. Viajé a los confines más remotos de la Extensión de Koronus para descubrir la verdad sobre el artefacto. Por fin logré capturar a uno de los hijos de Asuryan, como se hacen llamar. Bajo tortura, el xenos identificó la hoja como la "Danza Carmesí de Khaine" y relató su historia. Un poderoso guerrero empuñó el arma en su día, y marchó para erradicar una guarida de uno de los antiguos enemigos de su pueblo, los Oghyr. Evidentemente, no lo logró».
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. languages.text: "Onu aşağılık zeno Trazyn'in soydaşlarına ait kara bir mezarın içinde buldum. Eski sahibi olan bir Aeldari, ölümde bile ondan ayrılmayı reddedercesine buruşuk elleriyle onu sıkıca kavramıştı. Bu inatçılık, kılıcın ustaca işçiliğiyle birlikte ilgimi çekti. Bu eserin ardındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkarmak için Koronus Enginliği'nin en uzak köşelerine seyahat ettim. Sonunda, Asuryan'ın Çocukları denen kimselerden birini yakalamayı başardım. Zeno, işkence altındayken kılıcın 'Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı' olduğunu teşhis etti ve tarihini anlattı. Yadigârı bir zamanlar güçlü bir Aeldari savaşçısı kullanıyormuş. Bu savaşçı, türünün Oghyr dedikleri kadim düşmanının inlerinden birini yok etmeye girişmiş. Belli ki başarısız olmuş."
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. languages.text: “我是在一座黑色墓穴里找到它的，墓穴里葬着那卑劣异形特拉金的某位同族。它之前的主人是一位艾达灵族，那枯槁的手紧紧攥着这把剑，仿佛宁死也不肯松开。这种执拗，再加上这把剑精湛的工艺，引起了我的兴趣。我走遍科罗努斯扩区最偏远的角落，就为弄清这件造物的来历。最终，我擒获了一名所谓的阿苏焉之子。在拷问之下，那异形说此剑名为‘凯恩的猩红之舞’，还讲述了它的历史。一位强大的艾达灵族战士曾持有这把圣剑。那个战士前去摧毁其族人的远古宿敌“遗落者”的一处巢穴。显然，他失败了。”
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. Eventually, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."

languages.text: 「私は、邪悪な異種族トラズンの親族の墓に、この剣を見つけました。かつての持ち主は、エイルダーリ族の戦士で、死んでも手放さないとでも言うかのように、萎びた手で剣を握っていました。この頑固さと、この剣の優れた技術に惹かれました。私は、この遺物について真実を明らかにするために、コーロナス・エクスパンスの最果てまで旅しました。そして、ついに、いわゆるアスゥリアンの子孫の一人を捕らえました。拷問によって、この異種族は剣を「カインの紅の舞」と名付け、その歴史を語りました。かつて、この遺物は、強力なエイルダーリ族の戦士によって使われました。この戦士は、エイルダーリ族の古敵であるオグィール族の巣を破壊するために、旅に出ました。しかし、彼は失敗したのです。」
languages.original_text: "I found it within a black tomb belonging to kin of the vile xenos Trazyn. Its former owner, an Aeldari, was gripping it tightly in his shrivelled hands, as though refusing to part with it even in death. This stubbornness, along with the blade's masterful craftsmanship, sparked my interest. I travelled to the farthest reaches of the Koronus Expanse to uncover the truth about this artefact. Eventually, I managed to capture one of the so-called Children of Asuryan. Under torture, the xenos identified the blade as the 'Crimson Dance of Khaine' and recounted its history. A mighty Aeldari warrior once wielded the relic. This warrior ventured out to destroy one of the lairs of the ancient enemy of his kind, whom they called the Oghyr. Evidently, he failed."
